title: Request for planning permission for an Entertainment Resort Complex and associated development in Bedford: part 6 - Other documents
body: "6.1.0 Planning Statement             6.1.0 Planning Statement    PDF, 39.9 MB, 469 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email alternativeformats@communities.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      6.2.0 Design and Access Statement             6.2.0 Design and Access Statement    PDF, 70 MB, 145 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.
